hero.desc: Simply input text, get detailed scripts and hyper-realistic images instantly. VidForge provides the perfect raw materials to help you produce amazing videos effortlessly.
hero.prompt: /prompt: Write a script and draw a cyberpunk city at night...

features.title: Unleash the Power
features.desc: Everything you need to automate your content preparation workflow.

list.title: 100% Automated
list.desc: Automatically run multiple accounts simultaneously to generate massive amounts of scripts and images, saving you endless hours.

list.title: Smart Creation
list.desc: Generate ideas, write scripts, and draw hyper-realistic scenes using top-tier AI at a fraction of the cost.

list.title: Team Management
list.desc: Optimized for studios and businesses. Easily divide workspaces, manage staff, and keep data secure.

howItWorks.title: 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.desc: Preparing video materials has never been easier.

steps.title: Input Idea
steps.desc: Just write a few sentences describing the scene, characters, or the video content you desire.

steps.title: AI Processing
steps.desc: Our system automatically crafts detailed scripts and draws high-quality image frames.

steps.title: Get Materials
steps.desc: Download your complete set of scripts and stunning images, ready to be edited into your final video.

bottomCta.title: Ready to Start?
bottomCta.desc: Join thousands of creators revolutionizing content creation with VidForge.AI.

footer.desc: The leading automated AI platform for generating scripts and images.
footer.rights: All rights reserved by VidForge AI.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Unleash your creative potential with Artificial Intelligence.
about.mission_desc: At VidForge.AI, our mission is to democratize the video pre-production process. We believe that great ideas shouldn't be limited by budget or technical skills. By leveraging state-of-the-art Generative AI models, we are turning simple text prompts into detailed scripts and hyper-realistic image frames.
about.tech_desc: Our platform is built on a robust, secure architecture that allows businesses to manage multiple accounts independently. Powered by the industry's best LLMs and image generation models (like GPT-4 and Midjourney API), VidForge guarantees outstanding quality for your video raw materials.
about.vision_desc: We are building more than just a tool; we are building a creative ecosystem. In the future, VidForge AI will expand our automation pipelines to handle every step of brainstorming and visual design before the final video edit.

LoginPage.title: Welcome Back
LoginPage.subtitle: Log in to your account to continue.

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot password?
ForgotPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a password reset link.
ForgotPasswordPage.successDesc: We sent a reset link to your inbox. Please check your email (including spam folder).
ForgotPasswordPage.devNote: Dev mode: Reset link is logged in server console (mock mode).

ResetPasswordPage.title: Reset password
ResetPasswordPage.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
ResetPasswordPage.invalidDesc: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
ResetPasswordPage.successDesc: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now log in with your new password.

RegisterPage.title: Create Account
RegisterPage.alertMessage: This demo only supports Google Login currently. Click 'Continue with Google' to register/login automatically.
RegisterPage.description: Sign up today and start creating magical videos powered by AI.

Generate.greeting: Hello! What video ideas do you have today? Share them and we'll craft a script together. I'll help refine your idea before generating images.
Generate.connectionErrorMsg: Sorry, I'm having a connection issue. You can try again or click 'Start Creating' directly.
Generate.aiOverload: AI system is currently overloaded. Please wait a few seconds and try again!
Generate.apiKeyError: API Key Error: Please update a valid GEMINI_API_KEY in the configuration.
Generate.scriptDone: I have finished generating the script for you:
Generate.imagesDone: Here are the actual images based on your idea:
Generate.disclaimer: VidForge AI can make mistakes. Please verify important information.
